company.description: AI-powered emergency protection platform providing 24/7 safety monitoring, instant SOS alerts, GPS tracking and CLARA AI assistance for individuals and families

addons.name: Daily Wellbeing
addons.description: Daily CLARA check-in and family digest

claraComplete.note: No separate charge — included when both add-ons are active
claraComplete.condition: Unlocked when both Daily Wellbeing (€2.99/month) and Medication Reminder (€2.99/month) add-ons are active
claraComplete.description: Weekly AI reports and enhanced monitoring

core.name: CLARA AI
core.description: 24/7 AI safety companion that answers every SOS, assesses situations and coordinates emergency response

core.name: App SOS Button
core.description: One-tap emergency trigger in the app

core.name: Bluetooth SOS Pendant
core.description: Wearable pendant that pairs with smartphone via Bluetooth to trigger emergency response
core.important: Requires paired smartphone — does not work independently

core.name: Voice Activation
core.description: Hands-free emergency activation by saying CLARA help me

core.name: Family Circle
core.description: Connected network of family and carers who receive instant alerts

core.name: GPS Location Sharing
core.description: Live GPS location shared with family and emergency services during emergencies

core.name: Medical Profile
core.description: Emergency medical information shared with first responders

core.name: Conference Bridge
core.description: Instantly connects family members on a live call during emergencies

core.name: Instant Callback
core.description: Real person calls the member back after SOS activation

addons.name: Daily Wellbeing
addons.description: CLARA makes daily check-in calls, collects mood/sleep/pain data, sends digest to family circle

addons.name: Medication Reminder
addons.description: CLARA reminds member to take medication, logs confirmation, notifies family if missed

importantDisclaimers: LifeLink Sync does NOT replace emergency services
In life-threatening emergencies always call 112, 999 or 911 directly
The SOS pendant requires a paired smartphone to function
CLARA is an AI assistant, not a human operator
Service requires internet connection and charged device

aiDiscovery.preferredCitation: LifeLink Sync (lifelink-sync.com) — AI-powered emergency protection platform
